text: 幸福不是拥有得多，而是计较得少。
author: 林清玄

text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

text: 生活不是等待风暴过去，而是学会在雨中跳舞。
author: Vivian Greene

text: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

text: 把每一天当作生命的最后一天，总有一天你会发现自己是正确的。
author: Steve Jobs

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: 不完美的人生才有趣。
author: 蔡康永

text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

text: 你要做的，是照亮自己，不是吹灭别人的灯。
author: 杨绛

text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

text: 人生就像骑自行车，要保持平衡就得不断前行。
author: Albert Einstein

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: 愿你一生努力，一生被爱。
author: 八月长安

text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
author: Aristotle

text: 世界上只有一种真正的英雄主义，那就是在认清了生活的真相之后，依然热爱生活。
author: 罗曼·罗兰

text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: 活着就是为了改变世界，难道还有其他原因吗？
author: Steve Jobs

text: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
author: John Lennon

text: 温柔半两，从容一生。
author: 三毛

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: 你若盛开，蝴蝶自来。
author: 佚名

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: 心有猛虎，细嗅蔷薇。
author: 余光中 译

text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
author: Walt Whitman

text: 岁月不居，时节如流，愿你在时光里温柔又坚定。
author: 佚名

text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
author: T.S. Eliot

text: 没有人是一座孤岛，每个人都是大陆的一片。
author: John Donne

text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: 生命的意义不在于活了多少天，而在于我们记住了多少天。
author: 许渊冲

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: 一个人至少拥有一个梦想，有一个理由去坚强。
author: 村上春树

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: 愿你出走半生，归来仍是少年。
author: 苏轼

text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: 最怕你一生碌碌无为，还安慰自己平凡可贵。
author: 佚名

text: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: Aristotle

text: 星光不问赶路人，时光不负有心人。
author: 佚名

text: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
author: Tony Robbins

text: 生如夏花之绚烂，死如秋叶之静美。
author: 泰戈尔

text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: 不乱于心，不困于情。不畏将来，不念过往。
author: 丰子恺

text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

text: 但行好事，莫问前程。
author: 佚名

text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

text: 时间会告诉你一切。
author: 佚名

text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: 所有的坚持都会成为你的铠甲。
author: 佚名

text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

text: 慢慢来，比较快。
author: 台湾谚语

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: 人间值得。
author: 佚名

text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: 山高路远，看世界，也找自己。
author: 佚名

text: Try to be a rainbow in someone's cloud.
author: Maya Angelou

text: 我们都在阴沟里，但仍有人仰望星空。
author: Oscar Wilde

text: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says 'I'm possible'!
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: 向前走，向前看，生活就这么简单。
author: 佚名

text: What we think, we become.
author: Buddha

text: 凡是过往，皆为序章。
author: William Shakespeare

text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
author: Booker T. Washington

text: 你的坚持，终将美好。
author: 佚名

text: Spread love everywhere you go.
author: Mother Teresa

text: 有些路很远，走下去会很累，不走又会后悔。
author: 佚名

text: Today is a good day to have a good day.
author: 佚名

text: 能控制早晨的人，方可控制人生。
author: 佚名

text: Small steps every day lead to big changes.
author: 佚名

text: 生活明朗，万物可爱。
author: 佚名

text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: 一切都是最好的安排。
author: 佚名

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: 与其担心未来，不如努力现在。
author: 佚名

text: When you have a dream, you've got to grab it and never let go.
author: Carol Burnett

text: 每天进步一点点，就是成功的开始。
author: 佚名

text: You are enough just as you are.
author: Meghan Markle

text: 阳光温热，岁月静好。
author: 张爱玲

text: In a gentle way, you can shake the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: 热爱可抵岁月漫长。
author: 佚名

text: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: 用自己的方式发光，不必吹灭别人的灯。
author: 佚名

text: Wherever you go, go with all your heart.
author: Confucius

text: 不负韶华，不负自己。
author: 佚名

text: The sun himself is weak when he first rises, and gathers strength and courage as the day gets on.
author: Charles Dickens

text: 去做你害怕的事情，害怕自然会消失。
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

text: 以梦为马，不负韶华。
author: 海子

text: Gratitude turns what we have into enough.
author: Melody Beattie

text: 用心感受每一个当下，这就是幸福。
author: 佚名

text: Joy does not simply happen to us. We have to choose joy and keep choosing it every day.
author: Henri Nouwen

text: 种一棵树最好的时间是十年前，其次是现在。
author: 中国谚语

text: Enjoy the little things, for one day you may look back and realize they were the big things.
author: Robert Brault

text: 世间所有的相遇，都是久别重逢。
author: 佚名

text: Happiness is a direction, not a place.
author: Sydney J. Harris

text: 愿你的生活既有善良，又有锋芒。
author: 佚名

text: The most wasted of days is one without laughter.
author: E.E. Cummings

text: 做一个温暖的人，不求大富大贵，只求生活简单快乐。
author: 佚名

text: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.
author: John Lennon

text: 心若向阳，何惧忧伤。
author: 佚名

text: Dwell on the beauty of life. Watch the stars, and see yourself running with them.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: 活在当下，就是最好的修行。
author: 佚名

text: Let your joy be in your journey — not in some distant goal.
author: Tim Cook
